query:
-- Check recent release_notes (community popups) for life-lost content about Senyo
SELECT id, title, body, createdAt FROM release_notes ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;

rows.title: Patch Notes: Stability & Accuracy
rows.body: App stability has been reinforced. Expect fewer disruptions, more focus. Proof uploads are now more robust, ensuring your efforts are always recorded. Life-loss accuracy has been tightened, leaving no room for error or debate. The Ledger is absolute.

rows.title: System Patch: Stability & Accuracy Boost
rows.body: The latest update fortifies the app's core, ensuring rock-solid stability throughout your 50-day trial. Proof uploads are now snappier, reducing friction. Life-loss calculations are more accurate than ever, leaving no room for doubt or debate. Focus on the grind, not the glitches.

rows.title: Points in Play Now Includes All Bonuses
rows.body: We corrected the My Day points display so it lines up with the leaderboard. No action is needed — your submitted results and bonuses are still counted.

rows.title: Proof update
rows.body: Proof posts are easier to browse, reactions and comments are live, and Deep Thought now shows the right interpretation. Please tap to acknowledge.

rows.title: App polish
rows.body: Swipe between sections, open boost tokens only when needed, and read the mobile top three more easily. Please tap to acknowledge.
